chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI IInd Appeal No. 169 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1.For hearing of CMA No.3584/25 2.For hearing of CMA No.3585/25 3.For hearing of main case 08.10.2025 None present ---------- This matter was heard on 16.09.2025 when parties proposed to file a joint statement before the competent Court to close/conclude the dispute between the parties. Today, none have entered appearance on behalf of parties including their counsels. It appears that as per joint statement filed on 16.09.2025, the matter may have been settled and none have appeared. Accordingly, IInd Appeal is disposed of as dismissed in the above terms. J U D G E Ashraf
